scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix admin-dashboard && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
scripts.dev:lite: npx concurrently -n "UI,API" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "UI,ADM,API,WKR,VID" -c "cyan,magenta,green,yellow,blue" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:video"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:admin && npm run build:video
